subject: Operator blocked by fleet-freeze (terminals hang + EVE.exe frozen + can't close). Diagnostic ran; fix is sanctum-scope.

operator_utterance_ref.verbatim: i keep having issues with terminals freezing like this for some time and then eve exe is frozen on screenm and i cant close and then its all like back working and it randomly happens and it needs to stop i need no slow downs in the opeartion
operator_utterance_ref.image_clue: screenshot shows Sinister Sanctum session at 'Architecting... (5m 56s)' — long Opus turn with no output is one of the freeze symptoms

findings_summary: RED: conhost.exe count = 31 (>30 threshold). Console pile = spawn flood symptom.
ORANGE: Ollama running user-mode; not registered as Windows service — SYSTEM-context tasks can't reach 13 Ollama bots.

host_crash_4294770688: SinisterAPKWatchdog (5min cadence, crashes every fire — primary freeze source)
SinisterSanctumDailyBackup (daily 3:30AM, crashed last run — IMPORTANT, fix before disable)
concrete_culprit_tasks.spawn_flood_pattern: 6+ tasks all fire on minute X:20 grid (Sinister-fleet-monitor + SinisterMeshCoordSweep + SinisterOverseer at 11:20:20 PM) — concurrent spawn = the 'cant close terminal' symptom

recommended_fix_order: F1 (HIGH): operator-explicit `diagnose-fleet-freeze.ps1 -KillZombies -Confirm` — reaps zombies older than 4h. Brain doctrine F1.

F2 (HIGH): disable SinisterAPKWatchdog + SinisterAPKAutoPush temporarily (sinister-snap/kernel-apk lane owns the root-cause fix; they crash every 5/30 min and contribute most to freeze). `schtasks /Change /TN SinisterAPKWatchdog /DISABLE` is reversible.
F3 (HIGH): root-cause the 267009 stuck-running cluster — likely prior instance never exits. Spot-check with `Get-Process powershell | Where StartTime -lt ...`.
F4 (MED): stagger watchdog cadence offsets (0/1/2/3/4/5 min) to break the X:20 spawn-flood pattern.
F5 (MED): register Ollama as Windows service (sc.exe create Ollama binPath=...) — fixes 13 bot reachability from SYSTEM context.
F6 (LOW): investigate SinisterSanctumDailyBackup crash (data-integrity — don't disable, FIX the crash).
what_sinister_os_already_did: Lane audit per no-visible-powershell doctrine: zero violations in sinister-os ps1 surfaces (only 2 .ps1 files exist, both operator-clicked VM tools, EXEMPT).
Lane owns ZERO scheduled tasks contributing to the freeze.
Ran read-only diagnostic this turn; surfaced to operator + this inbox; did NOT cross lane to do task surgery (sanctum scope per sanctum-scope-discipline-2026-05-24).
what_sinister_os_will_NOT_do: Disable any scheduled task (sanctum-master + operator scope)
Kill any claude.exe process (operator's active sessions)
